description: Weavelet Canvas is an open-source visual workspace for AI conversations built for OpenAI-compatible APIs.
sourceCode: Checkout the <0>source code</0> on GitHub and give it a ⭐️!

initiative.description: Read the <0>Open ChatGPT Initiative for historical context.

support.title: Support
support.paragraph1: Weavelet Canvas is built as a workspace for AI conversations. Like any project, support and feedback help us continue maintaining and improving it.
support.paragraph2: If you find the app useful, please consider giving this <0>project</0> a ⭐️. It helps other people discover the project and supports ongoing maintenance.
support.paragraph3: If you would like to support the team, consider sponsoring us through one of the methods below. Every contribution, no matter how small, helps us to maintain and improve our service.
support.paragraph4: Thank you for being a part of our community, and we look forward to serving you better in the future.

discordServer.title: Discord Server
discordServer.paragraph1: We invite you to join our Discord community. Our server is a good place to exchange ideas about AI workflows, discuss OpenAI-compatible APIs, and submit feature requests for Weavelet Canvas. You'll be able to interact with the developers behind Weavelet Canvas as well as other AI enthusiasts who share your interests.
discordServer.paragraph2: To join our server, simply click on the following link: <0>https://discord.gg/g3Qnwy4V6A</0>. We can't wait to see you there!

privacyStatement.title: Privacy Statement
privacyStatement.paragraph1: We highly value your privacy and are committed to safeguarding the privacy of our users. We do not collect or store any text you enter or receive from the OpenAI server in any form. Our source code is available for your inspection to verify this statement.
privacyStatement.paragraph2: We prioritize the security of your API key and handle it with utmost care. If you use your own API key, your key is exclusively stored on your browser and never shared with any third-party entity. It is solely used for the intended purpose of accessing the OpenAI API and not for any other unauthorized use.
